summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was provided, low-signal closeout is disabled, and merge/fix/raise_pr actions are blocked by job frontmatter, so each open PR is kept independently for normal maintainer review rather than closed or merged by Clownfish.

actions.reason: Useful dependency update with green relevant checks, but this shard cannot merge it and there is no duplicate/superseding hydrated canonical to close against.
This is a substantive independent gateway PR with unresolved maintainer/author and check/review preflight concerns; it is not eligible for closure in this inventory shard.
There is clear maintainer review blocking merge, but no hydrated canonical replacement or low-signal permission that would make a close action safe.
Plausible focused bug-fix PR, but failing checks and blocked merge/fix permissions mean Clownfish should leave it for maintainer review rather than close or merge it.
Useful independent cron feature PR with green checks, but referenced replacement context is unhydrated and this plan-mode shard cannot merge it.
